programs.name: Crystal Disk Info
programs.description: A comprehensive utility for monitoring HDD and SSD health, temperature, and other critical drive attributes.

programs.name: CCleaner
programs.description: A system optimization tool that removes junk files and cleans invalid Windows Registry entries to improve performance.

programs.name: Recuva
programs.description: A file recovery tool designed to restore deleted files from hard drives, USB drives, memory cards, and more.

programs.name: Display Driver Uninstaller
programs.description: A specialized utility for completely removing AMD, NVIDIA, and Intel graphics drivers from your system.

programs.name: Blue Screen View
programs.description: Analyzes minidump files created during BSOD crashes and displays crash details in a clear, sortable table.

programs.name: CPU-Z
programs.description: CPU-Z is a freeware that gathers information on some of the main devices of your system

programs.name: AutoRuns
programs.description: Used to identify software that is configured to run automatically when a device boots up or when a user logs in

programs.name: TreeSize
programs.description: TreeSize is a hard disk space manager for Windows with customizable file search and several exporting and reporting possibilities.
